title: SOUJOY Set of 4 Porcelain Coffee Mugs, 15 Oz Hand Painted Coffee Cups with Handles, Glazed Stoneware Mugs for Tea, Hot or Cold Drinks, Best Gifts for Birthday, Thanksgiving, Christmas,White
features: Large Capacity: The set of 4 coffee cups has a large capacity of 15 oz, which will definitely meet your needs for office and home. Suitable for both hot and cold drinks, such as coffee, hot chocolate, tea, water, juice and beverages alike

High Quality Porcelain: SOUJOY Coffee mug is made of premium porcelain, not easily scratched and durable, 100% without toxic and heavy metals. Adopts healthy non-porous, will never absorb moisture and oils. Wide flat bottom, don't worry about tipping over

Blue Nordic Style: They are simple but classic design, impress your family and friends with stylish. You can choose the mug with blue and white pattern of different nordic style, according to your own preferences

Microwave Safe Mug: Every tea cup is handmade of the high-quality raw material, they can be put in the microwave, dishwasher, oven, sterilized cupboard and freezer. Never worry about the design fading away or peeling over time
Perfect Gift: The elegant design makes the hand made mugs as a unique gift for holiday, birthday, Christmas, New Year, anniversary, engagement, wedding, mom and dad, couples, friends and lovers
